trivia_bullets.text: Roadside Assistance is a new card (not a reprint) first printed in Aetherdrift (February 2025), sitting in the white uncommon slot of the set's Vehicle/Mount-focused design space.

The Aura creates a 1/1 Pilot token with inflated crew power (counts as though power were 2 greater), making it a rare example of an Aura that generates a separate token on entry alongside +1/+1 and lifelink buffs. Synergizes specifically with Crew and Saddle mechanics.
"No road has to be traveled alone." Functions as thematic branding for the set's cooperative racing framing — teams in the Grand Prix form temporary alliances against external threats.
